package.name: odometry_filter_node
package.description:
Lifecycle-managed ROS 2 node that drives the OdometryFilter EKF (provided by the odometry_filter package). Subscribes to /imu, /motor_rpm, /steering_angle; publishes /odom (with covariance) + /odom_diag/{yaw_residual_rad_s, slip_flag}; broadcasts odom→base_link TF at 100 Hz. Inherits node_base_cpp's BaseLifecycleNode for the standard ~/setup plumbing.
Driven by mode_manager via the two-phase SetMission protocol — the same managed bring-up the rest of the autonomy pipeline uses.
